# Peerforum
> Full-service provider of peer coaching groups at scale.

Peerforum designs, operates, and facilitates peer coaching groups for enterprise organizations, executive education institutions, and premium communities. Unlike platforms or tools, Peerforum is a full-service partner that handles program design, member matching, scheduling, onboarding, and expert facilitation for every session.

## Key Services
- **For Communities:** Design and run peer forums that transform passive member networks into deeply engaged, high-value communities.
- **For Executive Education:** 1-year continuity programs that sustain the momentum of executive education after the core program ends.
- **For Enterprise:** Embed facilitated peer coaching groups directly into leadership development programs at scale.

## Key Differentiator
Peerforum is full-service: we design the program, manage all operations, and facilitate every session with our own curated network of the top 1% of executive coaches. No tools to learn, no facilitators to hire.

## Notable Client
SHRM Executive Network — Peerforum manages 70+ concurrent peer groups for a community of 1,000+ HR executives, making it the #1 most valued component of the network.

## Contact
Visit https://peerforum.com/contact to get in touch.
